mapper.delete: DELETE FROM xml_users WHERE active = false

select.if: SELECT id, email FROM conditional_xml_users WHERE archived = true

mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.email, p.name FROM users u LEFT JOIN projects p ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE u.id IN (SELECT user_id FROM audit_logs GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY u.created_at
WITH ranked AS ( SELECT id, email, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY status ORDER BY created_at) AS rn FROM users ) SELECT id, email FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 5
SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE status = 'active' UNION SELECT id, email FROM archived_users WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT id, email FROM users u WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.user_id = u.id)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, status) VALUES (#{email}, #{status}) ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET status = excluded.status
